subcodes.first_line: Sanctified beyond all semblance and exalted above extinction is the Lord of Origin and Return, Who through His all-encompassing power and will [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تقدیس از مثال و تنزیه از زوال مالک مبدء و مال را لایق که بقدرت محیطه و اراده
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @Manifestation of God as mediator
